cxu_object.claim: Regime-adaptive strategy achieved the best paper performance at plus one hundred forty-one dollars while signal consensus was the best consistent live performer at plus eleven dollars and sixty-two cents and funding fade was the worst at negative two hundred forty-five dollars

supporting_contexts.text: Regime-Adaptive: +$141 paper (best single period). Signal Consensus: +$11.62 arena (best consistent performer, 2-3 trades/day). Trend Following: +$6 to +$55 depending on period. Funding Fade: -$245 loss in arena (worst performer, avoid).

Scalp Bands: -$30 to -$80 (fee destruction, 20-30 trades/day). Edge Detection: -$15 to -$40 daily fee drag (15-25 trades/day). Mean Reversion: +$18 peak but suffered pyramiding disaster at -$23. Simplicity beats complexity.

avoidStrategies.description: Strategies proven to lose money — never use these

version.change_description: Initial strategy performance assessment from one week live + arena trading
